tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting suboptimal long-term glycemic control, despite a low fasting glucose, which may indicate recent hypoglycemia or glucose variability. Creatinine is slightly elevated, warranting assessment of renal function. Platelet count, mean volume, and distribution width are increased, which may reflect reactive thrombocytosis or underlying inflammation. Other parameters are within normal limits. Correlation with clinical context and follow-up is recommended.
